title: Elemental Arachnids
description: This mod adds in nine elemental spiders to bring some danger to your Minecraft World
body:
**Introduction**

Welcome to the Elemental Arachnids, this mod adds in nine new spiders, each spider has it's own special challenge, spawns in certain biomes, and drops the normal spider drops of string and spider eyes, as well as something that matches up with their element.

**Arctic Spider**

The Arctic Spider can be found in cold biomes like the Ice Spikes or Snow Slopes, when defeated it will summon powdered snow, and it will drop spider eyes, string, snowballs, and ice.

**Combustion Spider**

The Combustion Spider can spawn in any biome, when attacked the Combustion Spider will cause a small explosion, and when defeated it will release a larger explosion, the Combustion Spider can drop string, spider eyes, tnt, sand, and gunpowder.

**Earth Spider**

The Earth Spider will be found in temperate climates, as well as, caves, the Earth Spider deals higher damage a large health pool, and when defeated the Earth Spider can drop spider eyes, string, stone, and a golden apple.

**Ender Spider**

The Ender Spider can be found in any biome, when defeated the Ender Spider will summon five Endermites to carry on the fight, and can drop spider eyes, string, and ender pearls.

**Fire Spider**

The Fire Spider can be found inside of the Nether, and when defeated will spawn fire on the block it was on when it died, the Fire Spider can drop spider eyes, string, blaze powder, and on very rare occasions netherite.

**Forest Spider**

The Forest Spider can be found inside of forest biomes, has high regeneration causing it to constantly regain it's health, and when defeated it can drop string, spider eyes, and every sappling in Minecraft.

**Lightning Spider**

The Lightning Spider can be found in the Jagged Mountains biome, when defeated it will summon down lightning on top of the player, and doesn't drop anything.

**Water Spider**

The Water Spider can be found inside of rivers or on beaches, when defeated it will spawn in water, and can drop string, spider eyes, and lily pads.

**Wind Spider**

The Wind Spider can be found in jagged mountains, as well as, the wind swept biomes, it also is extremely fast with the ability to launch the player back if it gets off a hit, and when defeated will drop spider eyes, string, and wind charges.
